message:
test: add comprehensive tests for RxJS, Zod, and tRPC libraries

Add test suites to validate freeze mode compatibility with real-world
npm libraries:
- RxJS: 27 tests covering callbacks, observers, operators (all pass)
- Zod: 10 tests for schema validation (8 pass, z.object() fails)
- tRPC: 20 tests for procedures and routers (runtime crash)

These tests identify freeze-mode specific bugs in object property
handling that need to be fixed.
